modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty renewing academic accommodations with changes.

full_description_text:  
A student registered with the Office of Accessibility is trying to renew their academic accommodations. They are unsure how to proceed with the changes needed for their accommodations. This situation has caused confusion and they are seeking guidance on the renewal process.
short_description: Difficulty renewing academic accommodations with changes.
description: A student registered with the Office of Accessibility is trying to renew their academic accommodations. They are unsure how to proceed with the changes needed for their accommodations. This situation has caused confusion and they are seeking guidance on the renewal process.
